Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Michigan
ShortDescription: 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Chicago/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Chicago/Michigan.

Eastbound buses will operate via Chicago, Wabash, Superior, Michigan and Chicago, over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via Chicago, Michigan, Huron, State and Chicago, over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier unauthorized person on the tracks near Chicago. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier unauthorized person on the tracks near Chicago.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
